title: Paathagathi Kannupattu Lyrics Kazhugu Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Paathagathi Kannupattu
Singers: Yuvan Shankar Raja
Lyrics: Snegan
Movie: Kazhugu
Music : Yuvan

Paathagathi Kannupattu Panju panja aachu nenju
Paaraangalu rekka katti parakudhadi yeda-koranji
Patta maram onnu, posukunu thulukudhe,
Nee sirikum podhu, Em manasu vazhukudhe ye.....

Unkitta kenja, ennoda nenja, ennadi senja sollu sollu
Kadhala sonnen, karpoora kanna ennadi panna sollu sollu ..
Paathagathi Kannupattu Panju panja aachu nenju

Manasu muluka aasa, ennadi naanum pesa
Naakku kulla koosa, thadu maari ponen
Kaanaaga kaanagathil alanji thirinja naanumthaan
Kaaathaaga enna urasi saachiputta neyumthan

Ullangaal nizhalatam nizhalatam ottikitten naan
Um pera usuru mela usuru mela vettikitten naan
Paathagathi Kannupattu Panju panja aachu nenju

Azhukka kedandha manasa, nee irangi alasa
marandhu nikkuren palasa puriyaama dhaane
Aaagaayam thaandi engo parandhu pore naanumthaan
Angaeyum unnenapa, anupi vaikura neeyumthaan

Nee paartha sedi pola sedi pola thalayum vaadudhe
Unkooda nadhi pola nadhi pola kaalam odudhe

Paathagathi Kannupattu Panju panja aachu nenju
Paaraangalu rekka katti parakudhadi yeda-koranji
Patta maram onnu, posukunu thulukudhe,
Nee sirikum podhu, Em manasu vazhukudhe ye.....

Unkitta kenja, ennoda nenja, ennadi senja sollu sollu
Kadhala sonnen, karpoora kanna ennadi panna sollu sollu ..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Paathagathi Kannupattu'?

The song conveys deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the complexities of relationships.

What is the plot context of the movie Kazhugu?

The movie revolves around themes of love and sacrifice, with the song highlighting pivotal emotional moments.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja, a prominent figure in Tamil music.

When was 'Paathagathi Kannupattu' released?

The song was released on November 24, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Paathagathi Kannupattu, the protagonist expresses the deep emotional turmoil of love, beautifully encapsulated through Yuvan's soulful rendition. The song plays a crucial role in the movie Kazhugu, enhancing the narrative of love and longing. With poignant lyrics by Snehan, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and melancholy, making it relatable to anyone who has faced heartbreak. This melody serves as a reminder of the bittersweet nature of love, leaving listeners with a lingering sense of yearning.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Paathagathi Kannupattu from the movie Kazhugu is a soulful melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Yuvan's enchanting vocals and Snehan's poignant lyrics, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet moments of romance. Dive into this captivating track that perfectly blends emotion and artistry, making it a must-listen for Tamil music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: My heart is like a soft cloth, it is fluttering. The birds are flying high, and the tree is swaying. When you smile, my heart feels light.
Tell me what you did to my heart. I spoke of love, tell me what you did to my sweet heart.

My heart is filled with desires, I also want to speak. I have changed my words, I have become different. I have wandered in the world of dreams, and I have become lost. You are the one who has captured my heart.
I have been caught in the shadows of the inside, I have lost my breath. I have lost my breath over my name.
My heart is like a soft cloth, it is fluttering.
My heart is sad, you are lazy and have forgotten me. I am flying across the sky. You are also sending me away.
You seem like a storm, and your head is spinning. Time is flowing like a river with you.
My heart is like a soft cloth, it is fluttering. The birds are flying high, and the tree is swaying. When you smile, my heart feels light.
Tell me what you did to my heart. I spoke of love, tell me what you did to my sweet heart.
